notes: Plugin makes outbound HTTP/HTTPS GET requests only to the user-provided URLs. No API keys, no MCP servers, no LLM API calls. Pure crawling + parsing + Jinja2 template rendering via requests + beautifulsoup4 + lxml + openpyxl + pyyaml + jinja2. Playwright is OPTIONAL — install separately for JS-rendered SPA support (300MB+ Chromium binary).
